title: Raccoon Removal in Uniondale, NY | $900-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Uniondale, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving residential & commercial properties. Call today!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Uniondale, where suburban homes and commercial properties near Nassau Coliseum provide ideal shelter and food sources. These intelligent wildlife pests often invade attics, crawl spaces, and garages, causing significant structural damage and health risks. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Uniondale and surrounding Long Island communities.
whyUs: Our licensed wildlife control specialists have over 15 years of experience handling raccoon infestations throughout Nassau County, including Uniondale's diverse residential neighborhoods and commercial districts. We use humane, effective removal methods combined with permanent exclusion solutions and full damage restoration to ensure raccoons don't return to your property.
localContext: Uniondale's mix of single-family homes, garden apartments near Hempstead Turnpike, and commercial buildings around the Nassau Veterans Memorial Coliseum creates numerous entry points for raccoons seeking shelter. The area's mature trees and proximity to Mitchel Field's green spaces make raccoon activity particularly common in attics, chimneys, and beneath porches throughout the community.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Uniondale?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Uniondale typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and extent of damage repair needed. A single raccoon removal with basic exclusion starts around $900, while extensive infestations involving families of raccoons, multiple entry points, attic cleanup, and insulation replacement can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Uniondale properties.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to Uniondale residents?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons pose several risks to Uniondale homeowners including rabies transmission, roundworm parasites in their feces, property damage from tearing insulation and chewing electrical wires, and aggressive behavior when cornered or protecting young. They can also attract secondary pest problems and create serious odor issues. Professional removal is essential to protect your family's health and your property value.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Uniondale home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Uniondale and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. Simple removals may be completed in 2-3 days, while complete exclusion and repair services for larger infestations may take 1-2 weeks. We work efficiently to humanely trap and relocate raccoons, seal all entry points, and restore your property to raccoon-free condition as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What raccoon removal methods do you use in Uniondale?
faqs.answer: We use humane live trapping with species-specific baits, one-way exclusion doors that allow raccoons to exit but not re-enter, and comprehensive sealing of entry points including roof vents, soffits, chimneys, and foundation gaps. After removal, we provide attic cleanup, insulation replacement if needed, odor elimination, and sanitization services. All methods comply with New York State wildlife regulations and focus on permanent solutions rather than temporary fixes.
